title: Modeling Cycles, Units, Error, and Uncertainty
description: Evaluate demand and capacity for a public program using incomplete measurements. Learners cumulatively produce a validated demand-capacity model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Turn stakeholder needs into answerable model questions, quantities, constraints, and validation criteria.
Track units, scales, significant digits, and uncertainty through multi-stage calculations.
Estimate how measurement and rounding error affect a computed result.
